textPlain: I see you use flags to determine if a file needs syncing. When we used fiemap within GNU cp we required FIEMAP_FLAG_SYNC to get robust operation.(We have since removed the fiemap code from cp, and replaced it with LSEEK_DATA, LSEEK_HOLE)
Can this be used in a public  cloud provider , to speed up VM provisioning in CI/CD pipelines? Im looking for ways to speed up app provisioning for e2e tests.
